SkillScript: 被动及战斗初始化脚本
Dialogue: 对话图路径，虽然其实用在statusui

SkillScript: local key = "Defect_cardsample_defect_discharge"; local st = CS.ScriptExecutor.PlayerInfo.SkillTime; if not st:ContainsKey(key) then st:set_Item(key, 0) end; self:AddEvent("StartRound", function() local s = CS.ScriptExecutor.PlayerInfo.SkillTime; if s == nil or not s:ContainsKey(key) then return end; local cd = s:get_Item(key); if cd > 0 then s:set_Item(key, cd - 1) end end);
